ORDER THE CLERK WILL ENTER SATISFACTION OF THE MONEY JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE. NOTHING HEREIN AFFECTS THE INJUNCTIVE RELIEF ORDERED BY THE COURT ON 01/29/18.

HEARING ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105) FILED BY SET FOR JAN-30-2020 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE TSANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT.(506) ORDER REQUIRING A REPRESENTATIVE OF COMCAST CORPORATION TO APPEAR PERSONALLY OR BY TELEPHONE (COURTCALL) ON MARCH 19, 2020 AT 8:30 AM TO ANSWER TO CHARGES OF CONTEMPT. THE COURT EXPECTS TO REQUIRE COMCAST TO PROVIDE AN ADDITIONAL 24 MORE MONTHS OF INTERNET SERVICE AT $113.36 PER MONTH BECAUSE OF COMCAST'S BREACH OF THE COURT'S PREVIOUS ORDER OF JAN 29., 2016. THE REPRESENTATIVE OF COMCAST SHOULD BE PREPARED TO ADVISE THE COURT IF COMCAST WILL GUARANTEE IT WILL PROVIDE AN ADDITIONAL 24 MONTHS OF SERVICE AT $113.36 PER MONTH. AT 8:30 AM, IF COMCAST FAILS TO APPEAR IN PERSON ON MARCH 19, 2020, THE COURT WILL CONSIDER AWARDING ADDITIONAL SANCTIONS AGAINST COMCAST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)- GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSANG, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION $2,068.66 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,113.66, COMCAST COMPENSATORY DAMAGES: $1068.66 AND COMCAST SHALL PROVIDE 24 MONTHS SERVICES AS SET FORTH ON ATTACHMENT AT $113.36 PER MONTH. COMCAST SHALL PAY PUNITIVE DAMAGES AT $1,000.00. COMCAST CORPORATION SOLICITED PLAINTIFF TSANG'S CONSENT UNDER FALSE PRETENSE WITH NO INTENTION TO HONOR THE TERMS OFFERED TO HER AND WILLFULLY AND REPEATEDLY FAILED TO HONOR THE TERMS UNDER WHICH IT SOLICITED HER BUSINESS & WILLFULLY CHARGED HER A HIGHER RATE. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
